name: Settings: User License Agreement
fullName: Check sections from settings screen: Settings: User License Agreement

beforeStages.name: hooks.LoggerHooks.startScenarioLogger(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "LYRASIS Reads" on Add library screen
And  Open Libraries on settings screen
And  Open 'LYRASIS Reads' library on setting screen
And  Open User license agreement on account screen
Then  User License Agreement link is opened

afterStages.name: hooks.ScreenshotHooks.takeScreenshot(io.cucumber.java.Scenario)
